items.name: AI-interview-simulator
items.description: AI Interview Simulator   Practice technical, behavioral, and system design interviews with an AI interviewer powered by Claude. Choose your role, level, and target company (Google, Meta, Stripe…), get real-time streaming responses, and receive a scored performance review with actionable feedback. Zero dependencies  just open and interview.

items.name: TCP-preconnection-relay
items.description: 自带预链接的轻量TCP转发，有效消除线路鸡到落地鸡之间的握手延时

items.name: AetherSwap
items.description: ⚗️ AetherSwap：全自动、零代码配置的 Steam 低价余额助手。提供现代化可视化 Web 控制台，基于数学模型智能选品，实现从买入到全自动上架的无人值守交易。

items.description: Unofficial ASUS Linux control center for asusctl with optional supergfxctl support

items.name: infomaxxing
items.description: Doomscroll your way to knowledge. An infinite-scroll feed of core engineering concepts, styled like X/Twitter.

items.name: webshell
items.description: Shared web console for Codex, Claude, and shell sessions, built with xterm.js

items.name: PALMYSTERY
items.description: An open-source, AI-powered palm reading web application that delivers the cold, hard truth—with a heavy dose of sarcasm.

items.name: launch-swarm
items.description: I run a 4-person startup and code part-time. This .claude folder is how I turn 4 hours into 40. 6 AI agents that write code, review PRs, plan sprints, auto-merge, take screenshots, and watch logs. Each one has rules about what it's banned from doing.

items.name: HeartLens-AppleWatch

items.description: Reverse engineering the R-Net CAN bus protocol for power wheelchair accessibility. DEFCON24 research (2016), open-sourced 2026.
